overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city district. The player character strolls along commercial sidewalks, crosses intersections, and passes under concrete overpasses in a sunlit urban environment featuring palm trees, neon signage, and futuristic vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial restaurant street with palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past the orange Caliente restaurant building

notable_agents.action: woman in yellow hat and plaid shirt walking toward camera

entered.detail: orange building with large yellow neon CALIENTE signage and burger logo
tall palm trees lining the street median
blue garbage bags and cardboard boxes piled near concrete barrier
large glowing advertisement screens on building facades

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit cyberpunk commercial street dominated by the orange Caliente restaurant building. The camera walks forward along a concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees, passing blue trash bags and pedestrians including a woman in a distinctive yellow hat. Digital billboards glow on nearby buildings in the warm midday light.

events.description: traffic light changes to green, vehicles begin moving through intersection
ego crosses from sidewalk onto crosswalk, moving left across the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection diagonally while navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: large horizontal billboard displaying FEELING HUNGRY TODAY? with face
concrete elevated highway structure casting shadows ahead
large vertical wall painting of robed figure with halo and text

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a wide urban intersection as the camera crosses the street. A large overhead billboard asks FEELING HUNGRY TODAY? while vehicles move through the intersection. The camera approaches a concrete overpass with a prominent religious mural visible on the right wall, while the Caliente building falls behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: street under concrete overpass with police presence

events.description: entering deep shadow under the overpass, lighting becomes significantly darker
police car with flashing lights parked on the street side

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass shadow, observing the police activity on the right

notable_agents.action: futuristic police car with POLICE text parked on street side

entered.detail: dark futuristic police vehicle with illuminated POLICE text on side
billboard showing DATAR text with monochrome imagery

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under a massive concrete overpass into shadowy, mixed lighting. A futuristic police car is parked on the right near a large religious mural. The environment becomes darker and more enclosed, with the overpass structure dominating overhead and industrial buildings lining the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with food vendor and large advertisement

events.description: exiting the overpass shadow back into bright direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking past a food vendor and approaching a large purple billboard

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the sidewalk near the food stall

entered.detail: massive vertical purple billboard showing sumo wrestler with SET SAIL FOR FLAVOR text
green umbrella food vendor with OPEN sign and display counter
vintage-style blue sedan parked on street side

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the shadowy overpass into bright sunlight, the scene reveals a massive purple billboard advertising SET SAIL FOR FLAVOR with a sumo wrestler image. A green food stall operates on the left sidewalk where a person sits on the ground. The street becomes busier with pedestrians and parked vehicles including a distinctive blue car.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban street with industrial buildings and parked vehicles

agents.ego_description: continuing down the narrower street passing parked cars and industrial structures

entered.detail: large brown delivery van parked on the street side
tall concrete industrial structures with exposed pipes and metal walkways

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues down a narrower street flanked by industrial buildings with exposed orange pipes and metal structures. The camera passes the blue car and a brown van parked along the curb. The environment feels more enclosed with tall concrete walls on both sides and fewer pedestrians visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, sunlit commercial street into the oppressive shadows of a massive urban overpass. It begins by walking along a concrete sidewalk past the orange Caliente restaurant, moving through a warm midday glow past palm trees, pedestrians, and glowing digital billboards. As the camera crosses a wide urban intersection beneath a large food advertisement, the open sunlight begins to fade while the Caliente building recedes into the distance. The scene then shifts toward a concrete overpass, passing a prominent religious mural on the right wall before moving directly under the heavy structure. Finally, the environment becomes darker and more enclosed, transitioning into mixed lighting where a futuristic police car sits parked against the industrial backdrop of the overpass.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bright, commercial thoroughfare into a narrow, industrial corridor. It begins by emerging from the shadows of an overpass into brilliant sunlight, immediately revealing a massive purple billboard of a sumo wrestler and a green food stall on the sidewalk. As the camera moves forward, the street becomes busier with pedestrians and parked vehicles, including a distinctive blue car. The scene then shifts as the path narrows, passing the blue car and a brown van to enter a more enclosed space flanked by tall concrete walls. Finally, the environment transforms into an industrial zone characterized by exposed orange pipes and metal structures with fewer people visible ahead.
